_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Garrett Crochet to undergo MRI on lat, setback in return from shoulder issue
items.snark: Crochet barely made it out of shoulder jail before his lat checked him right back in.

items.headline: Sonny Gray earns win with seven strikeouts over six innings against Cleveland
items.snark: Gray brought a 3.06 ERA and the offense brought eight runs in garbage time, perfect marriage.

items.headline: Is Craig Breslow going to be in charge of Red Sox for much longer?
items.snark: Sox fired Cora at 10-17, now at 25-33 Breslow still thinks playoffs are happening.

items.headline: Red Sox 9, Guardians 1: Sox win nail-biter in a rout with six-run ninth inning
items.snark: Offense ghosted for eight innings then remembered they get paid millions to hit baseballs.

items.headline: Drake Maye says he's thicker this offseason, excited for Will Campbell pairing
items.snark: Maye bragging about his bulk like a CrossFit guy who just discovered protein powder.
